channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Local 4 Game of the Week: Macomb Dakota vs Utica Eisenhower
item.description: This week’s Local 4 high school football Game of the Week is a matchup between two powerhouses for the Macomb Area Red Division Championship. The Utica Eisenhower Eagles will host the Macomb Dakota Cougars on Friday, Oct, 11, at 7 p.m.
item.dc:creator: Isaiah Hall, Local 4

item.title: Rafael Nadal gave his all until he simply couldn’t anymore and had to retire: Analysis
item.description: Rafael Nadal’s tennis career will be remembered because of the numbers, yes — the 14 French Open trophies, the 22 Grand Slam titles overall, the nearly two decades in the top 10, and so on — and, without a doubt, because of his riveting rivalries with Roger Federer and Novak Djokovic.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Colorado Mesa football took down Goliath in program-changing win
item.description: It was an improbable 14-13 home upset victory over fourth-ranked 4-0 Colorado School of Mines. The same team that beat them 52-0 at Stocker Stadium a year ago.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: LeBron and son Bronny James play together for the first time in a preseason game for the Lakers
item.description: PALM DESERT, Calif. (AP) — LeBron James grew up without a father, and the top scorer in NBA history has often said he savors every moment and milestone he can experience with his own three children.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: NASCAR playoffs roll into Talladega as cloud of lawsuit hangs over sport
item.description: It's most fitting that NASCAR this weekend races at Talladega Superspeedway, the sight of one of the first major disputes between drivers and the top stock car series in the United States.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Mets use another October rally to score 5 runs in 8th and top Phillies 6-2 in Game 1 of NLDS
item.description: Mark Vientos and Brandon Nimmo keyed another late New York comeback, helping the Mets break through for five runs in the eighth inning against a pair of All-Star relievers as they rallied past the Philadelphia Phillies 6-2 on Saturday in Game 1 of their National League Division Series.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Is the Chicago Bears run game back?
item.description: The Chicago Bears are relying on their running game and short passing game to replicate their Week 4 performance against the Carolina Panthers, as they have shifted away from a run-dominant offense under their new offensive coordinator.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9
